feed.title: Vibhat Srivastava
feed.subtitle: Professional Portfolio | Software Engineer & Automation Specialist

entry.title: Welcome to My Blog
entry.content:
Welcome!

I’m excited to launch this blog on serverautomation.in where I’ll be sharing insights, tutorials, and experiences from my journey in software engineering, automation, and cloud technologies.

What You Can Expect

On this blog, I’ll be covering topics including:

  • Automation & DevOps: Best practices, tools, and workflows
  • Cloud Infrastructure: AWS, Azure, GCP deployment strategies
  • Software Development: Clean code, design patterns, and architecture
  • Problem Solving: Real-world challenges and solutions
  • Learning Resources: Tools, courses, and materials that helped me grow

Why I’m Blogging

Technical blogging serves multiple purposes for me:

  1. Knowledge Sharing: Helping others who face similar challenges
  2. Learning Reinforcement: Writing about concepts deepens understanding
  3. Community Building: Connecting with fellow developers and engineers
  4. Documentation: Creating a reference for my future self

Stay Connected

I’ll be posting regularly on topics that matter to automation engineers and developers. Feel free to:

  • Subscribe to the RSS feed
  • Connect with me on LinkedIn
  • Check out my projects on GitHub
  • Contact me with questions or suggestions

Coming Soon

I have several posts in the pipeline covering:

  • Setting up CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions
  • Infrastructure as Code with Terraform
  • Kubernetes best practices for production
  • Python automation scripts that save hours

Stay tuned, and thanks for reading!

Have a topic you’d like me to cover? Let me know!
